result.preview: "No CPC group codes at level 5 have 2022 as their best year (i.e., the year with the highest exponential moving average of patent filings with smoothing factor 0.2) in the provided data."

args.answer: No CPC group codes at level 5 have 2022 as their best year (i.e., the year with the highest exponential moving average of patent filings with smoothing factor 0.2) in the provided data.
